Liu Wei еҠүиЎӣ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Wei (еҠүиЎӣ). Killed by local Yellow Turban forces. Liu Wei was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Wei lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
